title: @jackcoder0: Andrej Karpathy stopped using AI to write code. The co-founder of OpenAI. The man who built Tesla's Autopilot vision tea
summary: @jackcoder0: Andrej Karpathy stopped using AI to write code. The co-founder of OpenAI. The man who built Tesla's Autopilot vision tea
whyItMatters: Andrej Karpathy stopped using AI to write code. The co-founder of OpenAI. The man who built Tesla's Autopilot vision team from scratch. The person who coined the term "vibe coding." In April 2026, he announced that a large fraction of his LLM token budget was no longer going into manipulating code, it was going into manipulating knowledge. Then he published…
